message:
Onboard Vertex AI, Bedrock, and GitLab Duo native providers with SAP token exchange and expanded metadata

Three new native provider adapters, SAP AI Core OAuth integration, and metadata
expansion for Cloudflare and existing providers that previously lacked routing defaults.

New native providers:

Google Vertex AI (src/providers/vertex.rs, 962 lines):
- Supports both Google (Gemini) and Anthropic publishers via Vertex AI endpoints
- Reuses Gemini request/response types (now pub(crate)) for the Gemini publisher path
- Translates to Anthropic Messages API format for Anthropic publisher path
- Bearer token auth, streaming support, tool calls
- Region-aware endpoint construction: {region}-aiplatform.googleapis.com

Amazon Bedrock (src/providers/bedrock.rs, 1143 lines):
- Native Converse API adapter (bedrock-converse-stream)
- Translates pi's unified Context/Message types into Bedrock's
  InferenceConfiguration + system/messages/toolConfig schema
- Bearer auth fallback (full SigV4 signing deferred to bd-3uqg.3.3)
- Streaming via Bedrock's event-stream content type

GitLab Duo (src/providers/gitlab.rs, 468 lines):
- Native adapter for GitLab's AI chat API (gitlab-chat)
- Uses GITLAB_TOKEN / GITLAB_API_TOKEN for auth
- Constructs /api/v4/ai/chat/completions endpoint from base URL
- Streaming support via SSE

SAP AI Core token exchange (src/auth.rs, src/models.rs, src/main.rs):
- New exchange_sap_access_token() performs OAuth client_credentials flow
  against SAP's token URL using resolved SAP service key credentials
- Secret redaction in error messages via redact_known_secrets()
- Ad-hoc model resolution for SAP: constructs
  /v2/inference/deployments/{model}/chat/completions endpoint
- main.rs: on StartupError::MissingApiKey for sap-ai-core canonical provider,
  attempt token exchange before falling through to interactive setup

Provider metadata expansion (src/provider_metadata.rs):
- Cloudflare AI Gateway: OpenAI-compatible preset, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN auth,
  gateway.ai.cloudflare.com base URL template
- Cloudflare Workers AI: OpenAI-compatible preset, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN auth,
  api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts base URL
- Google Vertex AI: upgraded from NativeAdapterRequired to BuiltInNative with
  routing defaults (google-vertex API, 1M context window, text+image input)
- Amazon Bedrock: added routing defaults (bedrock-converse-stream API,
  200K context window, no auth header — uses SigV4/bearer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1026,6 +1075,56 @@ mod tests {
         assert!(provider_routing_defaults("azure-openai").is_none());
     }
 
+    #[test]
+    fn provider_routing_defaults_present_for_bedrock_native_adapter() {
+        let defaults = provider_routing_defaults("amazon-bedrock").expect("bedrock defaults");
+        assert_eq!(defaults.api, "bedrock-converse-stream");
+        assert_eq!(defaults.base_url, "");
+        assert!(!defaults.auth_header);
+    }
+
+    #[test]
+    fn cloudflare_metadata_registered_with_openai_compatible_defaults() {
+        let gateway =
+            provider_metadata("cloudflare-ai-gateway").expect("cloudflare-ai-gateway metadata");
+        assert_eq!(
+            gateway.onboarding,
+            ProviderOnboardingMode::OpenAICompatiblePreset
+        );
+        let gateway_defaults =
+            provider_routing_defaults("cloudflare-ai-gateway").expect("gateway defaults");
+        assert_eq!(gateway_defaults.api, "openai-completions");
+        assert!(
+            gateway_defaults
+                .base_url
+                .contains("gateway.ai.cloudflare.com")
+        );
+
+        let workers =
+            provider_metadata("cloudflare-workers-ai").expect("cloudflare-workers-ai metadata");
+        assert_eq!(
+            workers.onboarding,
+            ProviderOnboardingMode::OpenAICompatiblePreset
+        );
+        let workers_defaults =
+            provider_routing_defaults("cloudflare-workers-ai").expect("workers defaults");
+        assert_eq!(workers_defaults.api, "openai-completions");
+        assert!(
+            workers_defaults
+                .base_url
+                .contains("api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts")
+        );
+
+        assert_eq!(
+            provider_auth_env_keys("cloudflare-ai-gateway"),
+            &["CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN"]
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            provider_auth_env_keys("cloudflare-workers-ai"),
+            &["CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN"]
+        );
+    }
+
